fungal_diseases.description: Other fungal and bacterial wheat diseases

inferenceNotes.preprocessing: Resize image to 255x255 RGB and normalize with (pixel - 127.5) / 127.5
inferenceNotes.postprocessing: Softmax output, return top-K predictions sorted by confidence
inferenceNotes.usage: Run model once to get class ID 0-14. Match prediction with labels.json for disease or pest details.
